Title Infringement - Free Practice 3 Deleted Lap Times - Yellow Flags

2026 MONACO GRAND PRIX 
05 – 07 June 2026 
 
    
From The Stewards      Document 52 
  
To All Officials, All Teams      Date  06 June 2026 
 
        Time  14:13 
  
 
The lap times set by the F1 cars that went through the double waved yellow flag zone will be deleted as detailed in the 
Race Director’s Competition Notes (item 9, document 6): 
 
Session Free Practice 3 
  
Fact The F1 cars passed through a double waved yellow flag marshalling sector.
